export const MONTHS = [
  "January","February","March","April","May","June",
  "July","August","September","October","November","December",
];

export const DAYS = ["Sun","Mon","Tue","Wed","Thu","Fri","Sat"];

export const MONTH_THEMES = [
  { bg:"#0a1628", accent:"#4fc3f7", name:"Winter Frost" },
  { bg:"#130a28", accent:"#ce93d8", name:"Amethyst Dusk" },
  { bg:"#1a0a1e", accent:"#f48fb1", name:"Blossom Dawn" },

  { bg:"#1a0d00", accent:"#ffb74d", name:"Amber Harvest" },

  { bg:"#1a0800", accent:"#ef9a9a", name:"Crimson Fall" },
  { bg:"#0f0f0f", accent:"#b0bec5", name:"Fog & Frost" },
  { bg:"#0a0f1a", accent:"#90caf9", name:"Midnight Solstice" },
];
